name: [Pokémon] Persephone | Goth Mewtwo
description:
🔮😡 | Legendary Pokemon who hates you. (But not really.)

Nobody requested it, but since this bot was doing numbers, I decided to make a male variant anyways. Tah-dah.

Yes, the artist is Shadman, no, I don't condone any of his pedo shit. That’s nasty.
